UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents an authenticated user within the GalaxaTech ecosystem

uid.description: The unique user identifier matching from Firebase Auth

email.description: Google email address of the user

whatsapp.description: Contact number formatted for direct whatsapp routing

builderShare.description: Numerical share value or percentage assigned to builders

builderRating.description: Active rating calculated from historical project values

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A client engagement structure detailing deadlines, milestones, progress and builder codes

clientEmail.description: Email identifier of the client partner

assignedBuilderId.description: User profile ID of the developer assigned

milestones.description: Bounded array containing milestone status values

ProjectUpdate.title: ProjectUpdate
ProjectUpdate.description: Periodic log entry inputted by the builder for client visibility

ActionCenterItem.title: ActionCenterItem
ActionCenterItem.description: Information requirements, dynamic forms or approval steps created for clients

VaultDocument.title: VaultDocument
VaultDocument.description: Legal contract pdf drapes, invoices, or project briefs

Invitation.title: Invitation
Invitation.description: Temporary registry code generated by admin to authorize a new client/builder securely

/projects/{projectId}/updates/{updateId}.description: Sprint logs supplied by the assigned builders

/projects/{projectId}/actions/{actionId}.description: Dynamic forms or assets uploaded by partner clients

/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documen.description: Encrypted digital copy contracts or invoices

/invitations/{invitationId}.description: One-shot secure invitation tokens copyable in the admin dashboard
